recommendations.title: Lucia's Grace
recommendations.overview: During the evaluation of a plot of land, surveyor and distressed single mother Lucia meets a woman who claims to be the Virgin Mary.

recommendations.title: Satanic Panic
recommendations.overview: A pizza delivery girl is suddenly in for the fight of her young life when encountering a group of Satanists in need of a virgin to ritually sacrifice.

recommendations.title: Cam
recommendations.overview: A young camgirl discovers that she’s inexplicably been replaced on her site with an exact replica of herself.

recommendations.title: The Hippopotamus
recommendations.overview: Disgraced poet Ted Wallace is summoned to his friend's country manor to investigate a series of unexplained miracles.

recommendations.title: Vengeance
recommendations.overview: Ben, a journalist from New York City, travels to West Texas in order to investigate the death of a girl he was hooking up with while recording a murder mystery podcast along the way.
